chapter_question: How does total curvature remember the topology of a closed surface?
inspection_targets: Genus predicts total curvature through 2 pi chi.
Sphere, torus, and higher genus surfaces form the Euler ledger.
Swept spherical area becomes total curvature.
Each hole changes the signed curvature budget.

source_span.focus: Introduces the global Gauss-Bonnet theorem by linking total curvature to topology and Euler characteristic.
source_span.label: Chapter 16
source_span.title: Introduction to the Global Gauss-Bonnet Theorem
topics: Basic topology and statement of the theorem
Total curvature of spheres and tori
Topological degree of the spherical map
